name: PowerVision S1 Explorer Kit
description: Capture smooth and steady video with your smartphone using the PowerVision S1 Smartphone Gimbal Explorer Kit.

features.Key Features :: AI-Tracking 3-Axis Smartphone Gimbal | Companion iOS/Android Control/Edit App | Wireless Charging, Gesture Control | Foldable, Ultracompact Design | Integrated Tripod, Magnetic Phone Mount | Up to 15 Hours of Runtime | Can Charge/Power with Power Bank | Supports Phones up to 6.4 x 3.3" | Weighs only 10.5 oz
features.What's in The Box :: Power Vision S1 Smartphone Gimbal Explorer Kit | S1 Gimbal | USB Type-C Cable | Magnetic Phone Clamp
